title: taraxacum obtusilobum
intro: Taraxacum obtusilobum, also known as blunt-lobed dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as supporting liver and kidney function, reducing blood pressure, and aiding in digestion. Taraxacum obtusilobum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots can be used in poultices or as a decoction for topical application.
